mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emotion_anchor_events ( user_id, start_time, end_time, duration_seconds, start_pleasure, peak_pleasure, end_pleasure, delta_pleasure, start_arousal, peak_arousal, end_arousal, delta_arousal, event_title, trigger_reason, highlight_traits, summary, end_type, end_reason, ai_reflection, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{durationSeconds}, #{startPleasure}, #{peakPleasure}, #{endPleasure}, #{deltaPleasure}, #{startArousal}, #{peakArousal}, #{endArousal}, #{deltaArousal}, #{eventTitle}, #{triggerReason}, #{highlightTraits}, #{summary}, #{endType}, #{endReason}, #{aiReflection}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE emotion_anchor_events SET end_time = #{endTime}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds}, end_pleasure = #{endPleasure}, delta_pleasure = #{deltaPleasure}, end_arousal = #{endArousal}, delta_arousal = #{deltaArousal}, event_title = #{eventTitle}, trigger_reason = #{triggerReason}, highlight_traits = #{highlightTraits}, summary = #{summary}, end_type = #{endType}, end_reason = #{endReason}, ai_reflection = #{aiReflection} WHERE id = #{id} AND end_time IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT end_type FROM emotion_anchor_events WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND end_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COALESCE(trigger_reason, CONCAT('情绪波动事件(变化', delta_pleasure, ')')) FROM emotion_anchor_events WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (end_type != 'POSITIVE' OR end_type IS NULL) AND trigger_reason IS NOT NULL ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
